creator: amdmi3@amdmi3.ru
text:
> Synopsis: [Patch]graphics/osg:fix the build error after the update of gdal
> 
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=130642

Uhm, gdal is still at 1.5.0, and I don't see any PR's with update to it.
Actually shlib version bumps in dependent ports should be done by the
person who commits library update, multiple PR's are unnecessary and
confusing.

If you're planning to submit gdal update, just mention dependent ports
in the PR.

-- 
Dmitry Marakasov   .   55B5 0596 FF1E 8D84 5F56  9510 D35A 80DD F9D2 F77D
